body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Imaginal** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Phase Imaginal bridge-v3 targeted acquisition.

**Measuring brain potentials of imagination linked to physiological needs and motivational states.** — Frontiers in human neuroscience (2023). PMID: 37007683. DOI: 10.3389/fnhum.2023.1146789. Score: 47. While EEG signals reflecting motor and perceptual imagery are effectively used in brain computer interface (BCI) contexts, little is known about possible indices of motivational states. In the present study, electrophysiological markers of imagined motivational states, such as craves and desires were investigated.
